edge_types.description: Pod scheduled on a node, derived from kube_pod_info{node=...}. Always intra-cluster.

labels.name: scheduled_at
labels.description: RFC3339 timestamp of pod-to-node assignment within the queried window.

edge_types.description: Pod mounts a PVC bound on the pod's host node. Always intra-cluster.

Pod-UID-resolved RPC edge from service-graph metrics. May cross clusters when the resolved source and target pods live in different clusters (recovered from the topology pod-UID index since the metric only carries the trace-source cluster). An endpoint whose client/server label is a '://' connection string is resolved to a 'service' node or a real pod when it names an in-cluster Kubernetes Service / headless pod, and otherwise to an 'others' node (D29); endpoints with a missing pod UID and a non-URL label become 'external' nodes via the human-label fallback (D27).

A Kubernetes Service routes to a backing pod, derived from kube_endpointslice_endpoints joined to topology pods (D29). Materialised on demand only for services referenced by a '://' connection-string endpoint. Always intra-cluster.

labels.name: namespace
labels.description: Namespace of the service and its backing pod (optional).
